title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Black Maria, Unknown person #15, Luffy, Unknown person #16 as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As expected of a man with his reputation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You need to get out of the castle quickly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The all-stars have been wiped out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The odds of this new generation winning are a million to one,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we need to be ready if they somehow pull off an upset.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: News that big would exacerbate everything that's happening around the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...will be decided on this island in the next few minutes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But humans can't push themselves forever...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Surely they've already reached their limit?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: PANT... PANT... THIS IS GETTING GOOD!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The next time I was in the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: (The smiles of the mighty!! What will the fallout of this death match be?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I was thinking the same thing!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
